---
reference: inspect_ai
description: Tasks, evaluation, and scoring.
---

## Evaluation

### eval
### eval_retry
### eval_set
### score

## Tasks

### Task
### task_with
### Epochs
### TaskInfo
### Tasks
### TaskSource
### SampleSource
### enqueue_task
### enqueue_sample

## Scanning

### Scanners
### ScannerConfig

## View

### view

## Decorators

### task
### task_source
